description: 14 community fisheries are registered and officially recognized by the Ministry of Agriculture Forestry and Fisheries. Among them, 3 of which are located in Tboung Khmum province, 1 in Prey Veng province, 2 in Kandal province, 4 in Takeo province, 1 in Pursat province, 2 in Kampot, and 1 in Koh Kong. This is a partial document that contains only the annex in which community, name, village, commune, district, province, and coordination are presented.
